ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture URL for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "memo" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date and time the task was completed */,
  "important" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the task is important */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "recurrence" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the task is recurring */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., every Monday, every 2nd week) */,
  "parent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent task (for sub-tasks) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_parent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date and time the task was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date and time the task was marked as completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES task_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being attached to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the attachment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was attached */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attached file (e.g., image, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_attachments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being reminded about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the reminder */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder is set for */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of the reminder (e.g., email, push notification) */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Custom message for the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_reminders_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being tagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_color" TEXT /* Color of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being prioritized */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the priority */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Level of priority (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "priority_description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_priorities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_priorities_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_duplicates" (
  "duplicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duplicate */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being duplicated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the duplicate */,
  "duplicate_date" TEXT /* Date and time the duplicate was created */,
  "duplicate_reason" TEXT /* Reason for duplicating the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duplicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_duplicates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_duplicates_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being templated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_templates_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_templates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being reported on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., completion rate, distribution) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data generated in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_reports_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_calendar" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being displayed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the calendar */,
  "calendar_date" TEXT /* Date of the calendar entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the task */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_calendar_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_calendar_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being notified about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., assignment, completion) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Custom message for the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_notifications_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being integrated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration (e.g., Google Calendar) */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL for the integration */,
  "integration_token" TEXT /* Token for the integration (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_integrations_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_integrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
